backstory.original: The Dark Urge remembers nothing but a path paved with blood. Unimaginable cruelty whispers from within. Can he escape it? Would he even want to?
backstory.display: 邪念只记得用鲜血铺就的道路。难以想象的残酷之声由心而发。他能否逃离？甚至是否想逃离？

description.original: The Dark Urge strikes nearby enemies with a slash of his dagger.
description.display: 邪念会用自己的匕首斩击附近的敌人。

description.original: The Dark Urge transforms into the Slayer form for 15 seconds, dealing massive damage for the duration.
description.display: 邪念转为杀手形态，持续 15 秒，在此期间造成大量伤害。

longDescription.original: The Dark Urge transforms into the Slayer form for 15 seconds, dealing massive damage for the duration. Sceleritas Fel, immune to damage, takes his place in the formation for the duration.
longDescription.display: 邪念转为杀手形态，持续 15 秒，在此期间造成大量伤害。在此期间，免疫伤害的斯克莱里塔斯·费尔会在阵型中代替他。

description.original: The Dark Urge increases his damage each time he defeats an enemy, count persists between adventures.
description.display: 邪念每次击败敌人都会提升自身伤害，计数在各冒险之间保留。

description.original: The Dark Urge deals more damage when on the formation's edge or next to other DPS Champions.
description.display: 位于阵型边缘或与伤害输出勇士相邻时，邪念可造成更多伤害。

description.desc: The Dark Urge is eligible to start in all adventures, even if the Patron, Variant, or other restrictions would say otherwise. He also does not interact with any Champion abilities or variant effects that are based on age.
即使不满足赞助者、支线任务或其他限制的要求，邪念仍有资格开始所有探险。他不适用任何基于年龄的勇士能力或支线任务效果。
Each time the Dark Urge defeats an enemy, he gains a Murder stack. The Dark Urge increases his damage by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Murder stack he has. Stacks persist between adventures.
每次邪念击败敌人时，他获得一层杀戮堆叠。每从持有一层杀戮堆叠，邪念提升伤害 $(not_buffed amount)%。堆叠跨冒险保留。

tipText.original: The Dark Urge increases his damage each time he defeats an enemy, with a count that persists between adventures.
tipText.display: 邪念每次击败敌人都会提升自身伤害，计数在各冒险之间保留。

description.desc: Your formation gains one Ceremorphosis stack due to the mind flayer tadpole in the Dark Urge's brain. The Dark Urge increases his damage by $(amount)% for each Ceremorphosis stack, stacking multiplicatively.
邪念大脑中的夺心魔蝌蚪使你的阵型获得一层蜕变堆叠。每层蜕变使邪念的伤害提升 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

The Dark Urge has $(max_stacks___2) Outcast stacks, minus $(stack_reduction_per_champ_mult___2) stack for each adjacent Champion that does not have the DPS role. The Dark Urge increases his damage by $(amount)% for each Outcast stack, stacking multiplicatively.
邪念有 $(max_stacks___2) 层放逐层数，相邻每名没有伤害输出角色的勇士扣除 $(stack_reduction_per_champ_mult___2) 层。每有一层放逐层数，邪念提升 $(amount)% 伤害，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: The Dark Urge deals more damage when on the formation's edge or when next to Champions with the DPS role.
tipText.display: 位于阵型边缘或与伤害输出勇士相邻时，邪念可造成更多伤害。

description.desc: The Dark Urge's Murderous Slash attack is empowered by lightning. This increases the range by $(amount___2)% and deals up to $(amount___3)% more damage to enemies based on how close they are to him.
邪念的“杀戮斩击”攻击获得闪电强化，提升射程 $(amount___2)% 并根据与敌人的距离，对敌人造成最多 $(amount___3)% 额外伤害。

specializationDescription.original: The Dark Urge's Storm Sorcery origin causes his normal attacks to deal more damage with a larger area of effect.
specializationDescription.display: 邪念的“风暴术士”起源导致他的普通攻击可造成更广更大的伤害。

description.desc: The Dark Urge's damage is increased by $(amount)% for each Dragonborn Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中的每位龙裔勇士均使邪念的伤害提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: The Dark Urge embraces his draconic heritage and deals more damage when other Dragonborn are in the formation.
specializationDescription.display: 邪念接受自己的龙裔遗产，在阵型中存在其他龙裔时造成更多伤害。

description.desc: The Dark Urge increases the number of The Urge's Murder stacks he gains each time he defeats an enemy by $(amount)%.
邪念提升渴求每次击败敌人获得的杀戮堆叠层数 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: The Dark Urge's path of destruction draws the attention of divine powers invested in his murderous ways.
specializationDescription.display: 邪念的破坏之路引起了投入到他杀戮手段的神圣力量的注意。

description.desc: The Dark Urge unlocks the Form of the Slayer ultimate, and deals $(not_buffed amount___2)% more damage for each Evil Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
邪念解锁“屠杀者形态”杀招，阵型中的每位邪恶阵营勇士均使伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: The Dark Urge succumbs to his murderous impulses, delighting evil Champions and unlocking an ultimate transformation.
specializationDescription.display: 邪念屈服于自己的杀戮冲动，令邪恶阵营的勇士感到快乐，解锁杀招变形。

description.desc: The Dark Urge's alignment becomes Lawful Good, he gains the Control role and he unlocks the Withers' Resurrection ultimate, and deals $(not_buffed amount___2)% more damage for each Good Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
邪念的阵营变为守序善良，他获得控制者角色，并解锁“威瑟斯的复活”杀招，阵型中的每位善良阵营勇士均使伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: The Dark Urge suppresses his violent instincts, winning the approval of good Champions and gaining assistance from an unusual ally.
specializationDescription.display: 邪念克制自己的暴力本能，赢得善良阵营勇士的认可，获得一名非凡盟友的协助。

description.original: Go ahead, my sanguineous master - use your claws!
description.display: 去吧，我的血腥大师 - 用上您的爪子吧！

description.original: Now that they're unconscious, take off their head!
description.display: 既然对方已经昏迷了，那就把他的头给拧下来！

description.original: You are an exquisite artist with a blade, sire.
description.display: 大人啊，您真是用刃器的绝妙艺术家。

description.original: You gave coins to a beggar once. Gave me nightmares for weeks!
description.display: 您给乞丐施舍了一次金币，却让我做了几星期的噩梦！

description.original: It is an honor to follow your trail of gore, milord.
description.display: 跟随您的血肉之径是我的无上荣耀，大人。

description.original: Such a unique way of introducing  yourself.
description.display: 真是独特的自我介绍方式。

description.original: We have some free time if you want to get your hands dirty, master.
description.display: 大人，如果想要弄脏双手，我们还有点空闲时间。

description.original: These tadpoles are deliciously vicious.
description.display: 这些蝌蚪真是恶毒得美妙。

description.original: Making more True Souls for your own purposes, eh, milord?
description.display: 大人，呃，为了您自己的目的，多制造一些真实灵魂吧？

description.original: I like the company you keep, sire. Always soaked in blood.
description.display: 大人，我喜欢您选的同伴 - 总是满身鲜血的，真好。

description.original: They'll never delight in gore as much as you do.
description.display: 他们可不会像您这样对血肉如此欣喜。

description.original: Your followers crave the sight of your sanguine deeds, milord!
description.display: 大人，追随者们渴望看到您的欢愉之举！

description.original: You have a purpose, sire. Don't turn away from it!
description.display: 大人，您是有自己目的的。不要偏离方向！

effects.description: Increases the effect of The Dark Urge's Embrace the Urge and Resist the Urge specializations by $amount%.

description.original: Your restraint is curious, but I am sure you know what you're doing, sire.
description.display: 您的克制很奇怪，但我肯定够您知道自己是在做些什么，大人。

effects.description: Increases the Base DPS of The Dark Urge by $amount% and prevents roaming familiars from automatically activating The Dark Urge's ultimate attack.

description.original: The hells themselves will quake at your passing, milord!
description.display: 你光是路过地狱都要抖三抖啊，大人！

description.original: Time for the final act.
description.display: 是时候上演最后一幕了。

description.original: Ooh, that's sure to leave a nasty scar, milord. Bravo!
description.display: 噢，那肯定会留下难看的疤痕的，老爷。好极了！

description.original: In another world - another life - would my destiny be any different?
description.display: 在另一个世界——另一段人生——我的命运会有所不同吗？

effects.description: The Dark Urge also counts as a Human and increases the damage of all Champions by 20% for each Ceremorphosis stack the formation has.

character_sheet_details.backstory: The Dark Urge remembers nothing but a path paved with blood. Unimaginable cruelty whispers from within. Can he escape it? Would he even want to?
character_sheet_details.system_description: The Dark Urge is a DPS Champion with a mind damaged beyond control. Does he embrace his murderous urges?

event_upgrades.name: The Urge
event_upgrades.description: The Dark Urge increases his damage each time he defeats an enemy, count persists between adventures.

event_upgrades.name: Living on the Edge
event_upgrades.description: The Dark Urge deals more damage when on the formation's edge or next to other DPS Champions.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 邪念只记得用鲜血铺就的道路。难以想象的残酷之声由心而发。他能否逃离？甚至是否想逃离？
character_sheet_details.system_description: 邪念是一名伤害输出勇士，其心智受到了超乎控制的损伤。他是否会听从自己的杀戮渴望呢？

display.name: 恶毒联合

effects.description: 提升邪念的基础伤害输出 $amount%，避免游荡魔宠自动激活邪念的杀招攻击。

original.name: Blazing Blood

display.name: 炙热之血
display.description: 你光是路过地狱都要抖三抖啊，大人！

original.description: Time for the final act.

display.name: 血月

original.name: Vicious Damage

display.name: 恶毒伤害
display.description: 噢，那肯定会留下难看的疤痕的，老爷。好极了！

original.name: Human Glitch
original.description: In another world - another life - would my destiny be any different?

effects.description: The Dark Urge also counts as a Human and increases the damage of all Champions by 20% for each Ceremorphosis stack the formation has.

display.name: 人类变异
display.description: 在另一个世界——另一段人生——我的命运会有所不同吗？

effects.description: 邪念也算作人类，阵型每拥有一层“蜕变”堆叠层数，所有勇士的伤害提高 20%。
